item.title: 👍Sam Hatzenbeler - Economic Opportunity Institute
item.description: Sam Hatzenbeler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Economic Opportunity Institute.

item.title: 👎Matt Madeoy - Sound Cleaning Resources Inc
item.description: Matt Madeoy signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Sound Cleaning Resources Inc.

item.title: 👍Jim Freeburg - Patient Coalition of Washington
item.description: Jim Freeburg signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Patient Coalition of Washington.

item.title: 👎Sarai Childs - Business Health Trust
item.description: Sarai Childs signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Business Health Trust.

item.title: 👍💵Emily Brice - Northwest Health Law Advocates
item.description: Emily Brice signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Northwest Health Law Advocates. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Lars Ericksen - Seattle Metropolitan Chamber of Commerce
item.description: Lars Ericksen signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Seattle Metropolitan Chamber of Commerce.

item.title: 👎Kris Tefft - American Council of Life Insurers
item.description: Kris Tefft signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent American Council of Life Insurers.

item.title: 👎Katie Kolan - WA Insurers
item.description: Katie Kolan signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent WA Insurers.
